test_cases.name: create_author_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Verify creating an author with all fields (name, bio, born_year) returns 201 and correct response.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_optional_fields
test_cases.description: Verify creating an author with only required field (name) returns 201.

test_cases.name: create_author_invalid_name_length
test_cases.description: Verify creating an author with name exceeding 100 characters returns 422.

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_default_pagination
test_cases.description: Verify listing authors with default pagination (skip=0, limit=100) returns 200.

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_custom_pagination
test_cases.description: Verify listing authors with custom skip and limit returns 200.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author
test_cases.description: Verify fetching an existing author returns 200 and correct data.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verify fetching a non-existent author returns 404.

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_not_modified
test_cases.description: Verify conditional GET with If-None-Match and matching ETag returns 304.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify updating an author with valid data returns 200.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verify updating an author with If-Match and mismatched ETag returns 412.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verify deleting an author with no associated books returns 204.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Verify deleting an author with associated books returns 409.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Verify creating a book with all fields returns 201 and correct response.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verify creating a book with duplicate ISBN returns 409.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Verify creating a book with ISBN shorter than 10 characters returns 422.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: Verify listing books with filters (author_id, category_id, min_price) returns 200.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_search_query
test_cases.description: Verify listing books with search query returns 200 and filtered results.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verify fetching an existing book returns 200 and correct data.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify fetching a soft-deleted book returns 410.

test_cases.name: update_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify updating a book with valid data returns 200.

test_cases.name: update_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify updating a soft-deleted book returns 410.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_eligible_book
test_cases.description: Verify applying a discount to a book older than 1 year returns 200.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Verify applying a discount to a book published in the current year returns 400.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_exceeding_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Verify applying a discount more than 5 times in 10 seconds returns 429.

test_cases.name: update_stock_with_valid_quantity
test_cases.description: Verify updating stock with a valid quantity returns 200.

test_cases.name: update_stock_resulting_in_negative_value
test_cases.description: Verify updating stock resulting in negative value returns 400.

test_cases.name: upload_valid_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verify uploading a valid JPEG/PNG cover image returns 200.

test_cases.name: upload_unsupported_file_type
test_cases.description: Verify uploading a file with unsupported type returns 415.

test_cases.name: upload_oversized_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verify uploading a cover image larger than 2MB returns 413.

test_cases.name: create_review_for_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verify creating a review for an existing book returns 201.
